info.description: The user service is used to configure and manage users.
info.title: User API specification

post.summary: Resends the activation email of the requesting user if the account is not activated yet.

200.description: email successfully re-sent or account is already activated

400.description: malformed request, e.g. user is not logged in

get.summary: Return the current change request for the email-address of your personal user account.

parameters.description: optional userID of a standalone-user associated with the new email
parameters.name: userID

400.description: received invalid data, check error message for more information

post.description: Must include the new email-address and a current mfa-code if mfa is enabled.
post.summary: Create a change request for the email-address of your personal user account.

200.description: request successfully created, check your email inbox to confirm the change

400.description: received invalid data or pre-checks failed, check error message for more information

delete.summary: Abort the current change request for the email-address of your personal user account.

parameters.description: optional userID of a standalone-user associated with the new email
parameters.name: userID

400.description: received invalid data, check error message for more information

post.description: Handles the user login and returns a user payload with JWT token

mfa.description:
The user's current mfa code. This code is required if the user enabled mfa for his account,
otherwise it can be left empty. To figure out if the user has mfa enabled, you need to login with
username and password first. A http 401 error containing "MFA required" allows you to ask the user
a current mfa code. Sending username and password again with the mfa code will finalize the login.

401.description: email or password incorrect / invalid or missing mfa code / user invitation pending

get.summary: Returns a list of user sessions.

parameters.description: max. amount of entries in list
parameters.name: limit

get.description: Get the organization's saved invitation text configuration

400.description: missing or invalid data

put.description: Set the organization's invitation text configuration

400.description: missing or invalid data

get.description: Check if the current user has MFA enabled or not

parameters.description: id of the organization. This is required if the user is queried
parameters.name: organization

400.description: missing user id in auth token

put.description: Creates a new, disabled MFA config for the current user

400.description: missing user id in auth token

post.description: Enables a new MFA config for the current user

400.description: missing user id in auth token

delete.description: Disables the MFA config for the current user

400.description: missing user id in auth token

get.description: Creates ten new, one-time-use backup codes

400.description: missing user id in auth token

delete.description: Can only be used after leaving all organizations.

400.description: parameters missing or in wrong format

403.description: user is still a member of an organization

get.description: Get the current user's saved settings or the default settings if none are found

400.description: missing user id in auth token
missing user id in auth token

get.description: Gets the complete user payload from the passed JWT token

200.description: complete user payload for JWT token for queried email

requestBody.description: passed user update payload with new user preferences

403.description: user can't be edited from a different organization or user doesn't want to be edited by an organization administrator

get.summary: Returns a list of the current user's global and organization-wide availability.

200.description: list of global and organization-wide availabilities

put.summary: Immediately sets the current user's global or organization-wide availability.

400.description: invalid data

delete.description:
Immediately removes the current user's organization-wide availability override. Afterwards the organization
will return to using the user's global availability.
If there are scheduled availability changes for the user in this organization, they will be kept and executed
as planned.

400.description: invalid data

post.description: Invites an existing or new user to an organization and sends an invitation email to the passed address

202.description:
as the amount of invitations is greater than 10, the invitations will be processed in background. The
requesting user will be notified via email after the process is complete.

400.description: user invite payload is missing or in the wrong format

post.description: Invite the passed owner to the organization

400.description: owner invite payload is missing or in the wrong format

get.description: Returns all organization availabilities for the current user

post.description: Resends the invitation email of an existing user to an organization

400.description: user invite payload is missing or in the wrong format

get.description: Returns a specific user with the passed api for organization members
Returns the deployment notification configuration for the given user

200.description: deployment notification configuration was retrieved successfully

400.description: parameters missing or in the wrong format

post.description: Creates or updates a user deployment notification for the given user

200.description: deployment notification configuration was upserted successfully

400.description: parameters missing or in the wrong format

get.description: Lists all pending invites for the requesting user

400.description: couldn't parse userID out of token

delete.description: Removes a user from an organization

200.description: user was successfully removed from organization

400.description: parameters missing or in the wrong format

403.description: the last organization admin can not leave the organization

get.description: Returns all users from an organization

200.description: all users from organization with passed id

get.description: Returns the current user's saved availability change

400.description: user-id not found

post.description: Add a new availability change for the current user or update an existing one

400.description: invalid data in body

get.description: Returns all users from an organization with pagination

parameters.description: search query to filter user by name, surname or email
parameters.name: search

parameters.description: max. amount of entries in list
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: order query by column (either sur_name or name, defaults to sur_name)
parameters.name: orderby

parameters.description: order direction of orderby (either asc or desc, defaults to asc)
parameters.name: orderdir

200.description: all users from organization with passed id

get.description: Returns a list of all recurring availability changes created by the current user

parameters.description: max. amount of entries in list
parameters.name: limit

200.description: paginated list of current user's recurring availability changes

400.description: userID not found

post.description: Create a new recurring availability change for the current user

400.description: invalid request data

409.description: new change would be created inside existing changes

put.description: Updates an existing recurring availability change for the current user

400.description: invalid request data

409.description: updated change would be moved inside existing changes

delete.description: Deletes an existing recurring availability change for the current user

400.description: invalid request data

get.description: Returns a list of all scheduled availability changes created by the current user

parameters.description: max. amount of entries in list
parameters.name: limit

200.description: paginated list of current user's scheduled availability changes

400.description: userID not found

post.description: Create a new scheduled availability change for the current user

400.description: invalid request data

409.description: new change would be created inside existing changes

delete.description: Deletes an existing scheduled availability change for the current user

400.description: invalid request data

API-TOKEN.description:
You can generate an API-Token in the permissions-settings of your organization.
All requests will be performed in the scope of this organization. Requests regarding users will fail.
API-TOKEN.name: API-TOKEN

Personal-Access-Token.description:
You can generate a Personal Access Token in your profile settings.
All requests will be performed as the user who created the token, with permissions as configured in each organization.
Personal-Access-Token.name: Personal-Access-Token

BulkUserElement.description: BulkUserElement describes an user bulk element

ChangeEmailRequest.description: ChangeEmailRequest is used to update a user's email address

mfaCode.description: current mfa-code is required if mfa is enabled for the user's account

newEmail.description: new email-address for the user's account

userID.description: optional userID of a standalone-user associated with the new email

DashboardConfiguration.title: DashboardConfiguration is used to save preferences about dashboard configurations per user and organization.

Devices.description: Devices contains the alarm devices that should be created

Email.description: Email contains the details for an email address for email notifications

ImportResult.description: ImportResult describes the result of an import

Invitation.description: Invitation holds every information one could need to display an invitation from an organization in the UI

organizationID.description: ID of the organization that is inviting the user

InvitationText.description: InvitationText contains all information about a custom invitation text

JWTRefreshToken.description: JWTRefreshToken contains information about a single JWT Refresh Token

JWTRefreshTokenList.description: JWTRefreshTokenList is used as a paginated list of user sessions

MFABackupCodesResponse.description: MFABackupCodesResponse contains a list of one-time-use emergency backup codes

MFACreateResponse.description: MFACreateResponse contains all information for the user to add this account to his MFA app

MFAEnabledResponse.description: MFAEnabledResponse contains whether the user has MFA enabled or not

Mobile.description: Mobile contains the details for a mobile device for sms notifications

OwnerInvite.description: OwnerInvite describes a payload to invite an owner to the organization

Phone.description: Phone contains the details for a phone device for call notifications

PublicUser.description: PublicUser describes a public user payload

availablePreference.description: defines the status the user has selected; will be set to false if user invitation is pending

availableStatus.description: defines the status the user is currently in; will be set to UserNotAvailable if user invitation is pending

avatarURL.description: URL to the avatar of the user

editable.description: defines if the users allows admins to edit his personal data and devices

externalID.description: identifies a user in an external system

pending.description: defines an pending invitation (user is known, but hasn't logged in yet)

PublicUserList.description: PublicUserList describes a list of PublicUsers for pagination

QuickActionsConfiguration.description: QuickActionsConfiguration is used to save preferences about the quick action dashboard panel

Rank.description: Rank contains the user friendly name and value of a rank

RecurringUserAvailabilityChange.description: RecurringUserAvailabilityChange contains all information for a user's recurring availability change

changeDay.description:
ChangeDay is the integer description of the day in the week when a change should occur.
Sunday = 0, Monday = 1, ...

changeTime.description: ChangeTime it the UTC time when a change should occur, formatted as "15:04:05".

RecurringUserAvailabilityChangesList.description: RecurringUserAvailabilityChangesList is used for pagination of RecurringUserAvailabilityChange​s

ScheduledUserAvailabilityChange.description: ScheduledUserAvailabilityChange contains all information for an user's scheduled availability change

ScheduledUserAvailabilityChangesList.description: ScheduledUserAvailabilityChangesList is used for pagination of ScheduledUserAvailabilityChange​s

TableConfiguration.description: Using null or empty values will remove a specific field from the stored settings and result in usage of the default values.
TableConfiguration.title: TableConfiguration is used to save preferences for UI Tables.

activeColumns.description: ActiveColumns defines which columns are actively displayed

orderByColumn.description: OrderByColumn contains the column name the table is ordered by

orderByDirection.description: OrderByDirection describes in which direction the OrderByColumn is ordered ("asc", "desc" or empty)

pageSize.description: PageSize defines how man rows should be displayed per page

User.description: User is the comprehensive data structure containing all data of a single user

active.description: true if email is verified and account fully activated; false otherwise

availablePreference.description: true if user wants to be available for new alarms; false otherwise

avatarURL.description: URL to the avatar of the user

editable.description: true if organization administrators are allowed to edit this users devices; false otherwise

pending.description: true if user is invited, but has not logged in yet; false otherwise

registrationDate.description: date this account was created (by registration or invitation)

token.description: current JWT token for this session

UserAvailabilityChange.description: UserAvailabilityChange contains all information for an user's scheduled availability change

UserAvailabilityStatus.description: UserAvailabilityStatus represents the new status a user should be in after processing a change request

UserInvite.description: UserInvite describes an user invite payload

createNewLabels.description:
If set to true while importing a user with a label name but not an id,
we will automatically create and assign this label.
This setting will only work in conjunction with MapLabelsByName.

mapLabelsByName.description:
If set to true while importing a user with a label name but not an id,
we will try to find a label with this name and assign it.

removeAssignedData.description: If set to true, all assigned data will be removed from the user, before new data is assigned.

updateExistingUsers.description:
If set to true, existing users will be updated with the new data.
If set to false, existing users will not be updated.
If set to false und the user is already in the organization, the user will be skipped and an error will be returned.

UserInviteResult.description: UserInviteResult describes the import result payload

UserOrganizationAvailability.title: UserOrganizationAvailability is used to immediately set the current user's global or organization-wide availability.

UserUpdate.description: UserUpdate describes an user update payload

organizationId.description:
id of the editing organization
not needed if user is editing himself
